reviews.comment:
Si buscas un cafe al paso mejor busca otro lugar.. acá hacen el cafe muy rico pero tenes que tomarte mínimo 30 minutos para salir con tu cafe incluso sin haber gente en la fila.

(Translated by Google)
If you're looking for a quick coffee, you're better off looking elsewhere. They make very good coffee here, but you have to wait at least 30 minutes to get your coffee, even if there's no one in line.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/7652943530366249800/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNSaHMzaFVnEAE

reviews.comment:
Bárbaro todo. Le ubiera dado una estrella más, peeeeeero para los viajeros materos, siguen cobrando el agua, cuando en otras YPF es gratis. Vamos a ponerce las pilas 👍🏼!!!

(Translated by Google)
Everything was great. I would have given it another star, buuuut for travelers who drink mate, they're still charging for water, when it's free at other YPF stations. They need to get their act together! 👍🏼
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/7652943530366249800/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNSMnNHZGRREAE

reviews.comment:
Como en casa. La atención de siempre. Y ahora con lubricentro. Gente que ya hace 20 años conocemos. Lo mejor. Todas las modalidades de pago. Y vuelvo a repetir. En familia. Gracias Martin

(Translated by Google)
Just like home. The same great service. And now with a lube center. People we've known for 20 years. The best. All payment options. And I'll say it again. Like family. Thanks, Martin
